steps.title: Spot the methodology requirement
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize methodology — the actual research process. From the notes, Kind's team reviewed 132 medical school websites, examining their policies. We need the choice that describes this research action.

steps.title: Find the process description
steps.content:
B explicitly states the action the researchers took: “examined the student policies of 132 medical schools.” Choice
  • A describes where data is located
  • C presents the results
  • D states the research goal — none of these convey the actual research process
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
